--- Page: /beyond-the-menu ---
Beyond The Menu - Waffle House
Beyond The Menu
Did you know?
If you laid all of the Smithfield Bacon that Waffle House® serves in a year, end-to-end, it would wrap all the way around the equator!  That’s over 25,000 miles of a Bacon Belt!!  If you could stack all of the Sausage Patties that Waffle House® serves in one day on top of each other, it would be nearly twice the size of the World’s Tallest Building, Burj Khalifa in Dubai or four times the size of the Empire State Building!  Now that’s a tall order!  If you poured all of the cups of Coffee that Waffle House® serves in one year, it would be enough to fill nearly 8 Olympic swimming pools!

Waffle House Waffles
post
Texas has a history of producing greatness like Willie Nelson AND Beyonce’, Texas Rangers (Walker, that is), a great state fair and Waffle House waffles.  C.H. Guenther & Son Inc.  (CHG) started operating its first flour mill in the hill country of southern Texas back in 1851.  As a guild-certified master millwright, Carl Hilmar Guenther […]
Read More
Click here to go to the Waffle House & Simply Beverages post
Waffle House & Simply Beverages
post
It all began in the grove. Like our drinks, our story is simple. Simply juices taste amazing because they are made from amazing-tasting fruit–never from concentrate and no added preservatives or artificial flavors.
Our simple philosophy: Mother Nature knows best.  Here you’ll find ingredients sourced from the grove, not created in the lab. Simply juices taste so refreshing and […]
Read More
Click here to go to the Waffle House Hashbrowns post
Waffle House Hashbrowns
post
Some say “Po-tay-to.”    Others say “Po-tah-to.”    We simply say “Scattered, Smothered & Covered®”.
